observations.note: All 44 tests across 4 test suites pass. AC#1 (10 tests), AC#2 (14 tests), AC#3 (10 tests), AC#4 (10 tests) all green.
Anti-gaming validation PASSED. Zero skip decorators, zero empty tests, zero TODO/FIXME placeholders, zero excessive mocking across all test files.

Output directory devforgeai/specs/business/operations/ can be created successfully. Parent directory devforgeai/specs/business/ exists with peer directories (financial/, legal/, market-research/). No conflicts.

Reference file follows the same structural pattern as peer business skill references (planning-business, managing-finances): H1 title, output path directive, --- dividers, H2 section headers. 93 lines is appropriately concise.

No naming conflicts detected. mvp-launch-checklist.md is unique across all skill directories. Other checklist files (ip-protection-checklist, release-checklist, validation-checklists) serve different purposes in different skills.

The operational .claude/skills/operating-business/ directory does not yet exist. The src/ reference file is ready for deployment but the skill SKILL.md and operational directory have not been created yet. This is expected for a story that only delivers the reference file.

30 checklist items across 5 domains (6 per domain). All items use consistent '- [ ] **Bold Title** - Description' format. All four business model types (SaaS, marketplace, service, product) properly referenced with model-specific item tagging. Progressive disclosure section includes chunk size (5-7), threshold (20), pacing prompts, and fallback behavior.
